FUTURUM EQUITIES PODCAST EPISODE #44

Daniel and I will be live on the Futurum Equities YouTube channel today at 1PM EST covering: 

• $AVGO earnings & why custom silicon demand still looks very real despite the stock reaction
• $CRDO revenue tripling & why AI connectivity may be growing as fast as compute
• $CRWD & $RBRK earnings and what’s driving the stock pressure
• $META enterprise AI push with Business Agent across WhatsApp, Instagram & Messenger
• $NVDA all-in CPU push & what Vera means for $AMD, $INTC &  $ARM 
• Anthropic’s potential IPO & why it could reprice $AMZN, $GOOGL & $MSFT as AI demand proxies

We’ll leave the last 10 minutes for live Q&A so bring your questions!
$PL DOWN OVER 20% TODAY  😳

$AVGO has locked in some of the most important AI infrastructure customers on Earth across the next several years: 

• $GOOGL long-term deal to design and supply future TPU generations plus AI-rack networking through 2031
• $META initial MTIA commitment above 1GW with a multi-gigawatt roadmap through 2029
• Anthropic ~3.5GW of next-gen TPU-based compute starting 2027 (on top of ~1GW live in 2026)

Clear validation that custom silicon and networking will be massive layers of the AI economy.

THE $SPCX VALUATION JOURNEY

• 2002: $27M valuation with no rocket flown yet
• 2010: ~$1B valuation after Falcon 9’s first flight
• 2015: ~$10B valuation after $GOOGL invested with Starlink announced but still pre-revenue
• 2024: ~$350B valuation as Starlink became a real revenue engine
• 2025: ~$800B valuation as IPO plans firmed up & Starlink subscription revenue scales
• Jan 2026: ~$1.3T valuation after xAI was folded in which added AI optionality
• June 2026: ~$1.8T reported pre-IPO valuation with Starlink anchoring the core and xAI driving the final valuation leg

MAY U.S. JOBS REPORT

• Nonfarm Payrolls +172K vs Est. +80K
• Unemployment Rate 4.3% vs Est. 4.3%

The labor market did not crack here.

$PLTR CEO Alex Karp said Palantir’s “secret to sales” is hoping customers LLM companies first and realize “they don’t care about you at all.”

Frontier AI Models solve real problems but create even bigger ones while Palantir gives customers the ontology layer to solve those problems and “own the means of production.”

$NVDA CEO Jensen Huang says $MU, Samsung and SK Hynix are all “in production” on HBM4 for Vera Rubin

Nvidia now has all three major memory suppliers lined up for its next-generation AI platform.
I really enjoyed this pod with Dan Nathan @RiskReversal with a focus on the big picture and why I believe 2026 is similar to 1997 & 1998.

What happens when you roll a grenade down the hallway of your own life?

For @LizThomasStrat, it meant leaving Wisconsin at 32 with nothing but her cat, Bitty, and a dream of making it on Wall Street.

Now the Chief Market Strategist at SoFi, Liz joins us at Harry’s to talk career reinvention, taking risks before you feel ready, leaving safety for opportunity, and why the biggest moves in life usually feel uncomfortable at first. piped.video/watch?v=_ac2rYWc…

$NVDA CEO Jensen Huang confirmed Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron have all qualified to supply HBM4 for Nvidia’s next-gen Vera Rubin AI platform, per Bloomberg. “All three vendors are in production, and they’re all racing to support Vera Rubin,” Huang told reporters.

Apparently I touched a nerve last night about Bitcoin by posting “they gonna margin call Saylor aren’t they fam.”

Had a chance to sleep on it, reflect, and I’d like to apologize.

Decided to write a mea culpa thread analyzing the post.

Please take the time to read it.

🧵⬇️
I think Japan is about to prove me right
I WANT MY KIDNEY BACK
Now do you get why I was so excited yesterday
AND WHERE THE FUCK IS MATT DAMON
They literally taking SpaceX public just as Japan is about to fuck the entire world
When do I start becoming annoying as fuck?

The @SpaceX IPO is almost here.

Since SpaceX announced its target for a Nasdaq listing on June 12th, capital has rushed into the public space ecosystem.

However, SpaceX is more than just a space company. It is also Connectivity and AI. Currently, @Starlink is the company's main revenue driver, and AI is seen as SpaceX's biggest opportunity.

For most investors, SpaceX has been out of reach.

The KraneShares Artificial Intelligence & Technology ETF (Ticker: $AGIX) holds SpaceX as a private portfolio position, alongside a basket of public AI and technology companies that have invested in or partnered with SpaceX, including $NVDA, $GOOG, $MSFT, and $AMZN.

Read our latest article: rebrand.ly/fda5bd

For AGIX's top ten holdings: rebrand.ly/08aa82

I am not against Bitcoin.

I own Bitcoin.

I'm against mother fucking stupid narratives that cause people to overleverage an insanely volatile investment.

This isn’t about Bitcoin.

This is about Japan.

You are about to understand this.

🇯🇵🐦‍🔥☝️
